heroTitle: Discover a New Path to Pain Relief!
practitionersIntro: At Meridian Osteopathy, our team combines the principles of osteopathy with Traditional Chinese Medicine, acupuncture, and Chinese herbal medicine to provide a comprehensive and holistic approach to treatment.
ctaHeading: Ready to start your journey to pain relief?

servicesIntro.title: Osteopathy
servicesIntro.description: Osteopathy treatment can be beneficial for people of all age groups, ranging from infants to seniors. This therapeutic approach uses gentle manipulations and cranial techniques to bring back equilibrium, improve mobility, and enhance overall well-being.

servicesIntro.title: Medical Acupuncture
servicesIntro.description: Medical Acupuncture is a modern evidence-based treatment that merges traditional acupuncture techniques with contemporary medical knowledge. By stimulating specific points on the body, it promotes the flow of energy, releases tension, and activates the body's natural pain and stress mechanisms.

servicesIntro.title: Sports Rehabilitation
servicesIntro.description: Our dedicated team is committed to restoring your strength, flexibility, and stability, ensuring a safe and effective return to your favourite activities. With tailored exercise programs and a holistic approach, we'll guide you every step of the way towards optimal performance.

faq.question: Do I need a GP referral? No — book directly
faq.answer: No GP referral is needed for osteopathy appointments. You can book directly online or by calling us. If you have an ACC claim, we can process it for you at your first visit.

faq.question: How many sessions will I need
faq.answer: This varies depending on your condition. Many patients notice improvement after 1-3 sessions. During your first consultation, we'll discuss a treatment plan tailored to your needs.

faq.question: What should I wear to my appointment
faq.answer: Wear comfortable, loose-fitting clothing that allows easy movement. We may need to examine and treat areas around your complaint, so clothing you can move easily in is ideal.

faq.question: What's the difference between osteopathy and physiotherapy?
faq.answer: While both professions treat musculoskeletal conditions, osteopathy takes a whole-body approach, looking at how all systems interconnect. Osteopaths use a wider range of hands-on techniques including joint mobilisation, soft tissue work, and cranial techniques.
